docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, MELVIN MCGUIRE, MARLENE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, MELVIN MCGUIRE, MARLENE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, MELVIN MCGUIRE, MARLENE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BERENSTEIN, SIDNEY SUBSTITUTED FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT AS ATTORNEY FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-31-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-13-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

COURT CONVENES. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, VINCENT KIRCHER, SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1315 POLK STREET #522. A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT PHYSICAL EVICTION SHALL NOT TAKE PLACE BEFORE 4-19-94 DEFENDANTS SHALL WAIVE ALL CLAIMS AGAINST PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS ARE THE SOLE OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. DEFENDANTS SHALL NOT MOVE TO STAY BEYOND 4-19-94. THE LEASE, IN THIS MATTER, SHALL BE FORFEITED. ALL PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISES AFTER 4-19-94, SHALL BECOME THE PROPERTY OF THE LANDLORD. DEFENDANTS WAIVE ALL CLAIMS THEY HAVE AGAINST PLAINTIFF. IF DEFENDANTS MOVE BY 4-19-94, PLAINTIFF SHALL VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, MELVIN MCGUIRE, MARLENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1315 POLK STREET, #522, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL APR-19-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, A WRIT OF EXECUTION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT ACTUAL EVICTION SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 4-19-94.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DRV IS $27.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, MELVIN MCGUIRE, MARLENE
